title: JustMoveIt
description: Cut structures from the world and move them with a live placement preview and precise positioning tools.
body:
🧩 JustMoveIt

JustMoveIt is a powerful and intuitive building utility mod that allows you to copy, cut, move, and edit structures directly in the world.
It brings schematic-like functionality into normal gameplay, making large builds and precise edits fast and effortless.

Perfect for both Survival and Creative players

 

 

⚙️ Features

 

🔹 Two Operation Modes

Copy Mode 

Cut Mode 

 

🔹 Full Data Preservation

Complete NBT data support

 

🔹 Advanced Configuration

  • Detailed and user-friendly mod settings menu

  • Supports both resource-based usage and cheat mode

 

 

 

Controls


M — Activate the mod


Select two corners to define an area


Ctrl + Mouse Wheel — Edit selection size
Right Click — Cut selected area


C — Copy selected area


Place anywhere in the world


Edit placement before printing


Print the structure


G — Open detailed mod menu

 

 

 

 

Now works with Create: Pattern Schematics
